head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Northland, Auckland, Coromandel, Bay of Plenty and Taupo, also Gisborne to Wairarapa, Nelson and Marlborough
Mainly fine.
Waikato to Wellington, including Taumarunui and Taihape
Fine tonight. Cloudy periods tomorrow, with the odd light shower from Taranaki northwards.
Buller, Grey and Westland
Cloudy periods. Cloud increasing tomorrow, and isolated showers developing.
Canterbury
Clouding building, with the chance of a shower from tomorrow afternoon.
Otago, Southland and Fiordland
Mostly cloudy, with a few showers about Fiordland and Stewart Island. Showers spreading elsewhere tomorrow morning, a few possibly heavy, then easing towards evening.
Chatham Islands
Mostly cloudy. A few showers developing tomorrow afternoon.
Monday

North Island: Partly cloudy with isolated light showers, especially in the east.
South Island: Scattered rain or showers in the south, and a few showers in the west. Mainly fine elsewhere.
Tuesday

North Island: Mainly fine, but isolated showers north of the Central Plateau.
South Island: Scattered showers in the south and west. Mainly fine elsewhere.
Wednesday

North Island: Cloudy periods and isolated showers, mainly in the west.
South Island: Showers in the west, becoming heavy and spreading elsewhere later.
Chatham Islands
A few showers on Monday, then fine. Strong southwesterlies easing on Monday, then turning northwest and strengthening on Wednesday.
Issued: 7:50pm Saturday 25 Apr 2026
© 2026 MetService. All rights reserved

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
